message:
fix(extensions_js): improve CJS/ESM compat, proxy stubs, private field rewriting, and export fallback

Enhance the JS runtime compatibility layer for broader extension support
across community, npm, and third-party extension tiers:

CJS-to-ESM rewriter (maybe_cjs_to_esm):
- Detect module['exports'], module["exports"], exports., exports[ bracket
  patterns in addition to existing module.exports detection
- Detect __dirname/__filename references and inject import.meta.url
  polyfills automatically
- Handle mixed CJS+ESM source correctly (previously skipped CJS bindings
  when ESM imports were detected)
- Avoid emitting duplicate export default when source already has one

Private identifier rewriting (rewrite_legacy_private_identifiers):
- New lexical transform converting #field private class syntax to
  __pijs_private_field for QuickJS compatibility
- Properly handles comments, strings, and template literals to avoid
  false rewrites in non-code contexts

Proxy stub generation (generate_proxy_stub_module):
- Accept named exports extracted from import sites via extract_import_names
- Generate per-name "export const X = __stub" for each named import,
  eliminating "missing export" errors during module resolution
- Track named exports per specifier in dynamic_virtual_named_exports map
- Broaden auto-stub policy: community/unknown tiers can now auto-stub
  any non-blocklisted package (Pattern 4 aggressive repair in AutoStrict)

New virtual module stubs:
- openclaw/plugin-sdk and clawdbot/plugin-sdk with definePlugin,
  createPlugin, tool, command, provider, OpenClawPlugin, registerOpenClaw,
  jsonResult, stripAnsi exports
- zod schema validation library stub with chainable builder pattern
- Extended pi API shim: truncateToVisualLines, estimateTokens,
  isToolCallEventType, AuthStorage, createAgentSession

Extension loader export shape fallback:
- Cascading init function resolution: try named exports (init, initialize,
  setup, register, plugin, main), then nested default exports with same
  keys, then first function export
- Emit repair events for each fallback path used

Conformance artifact fixes:
- Rename __dirname to extensionDir in 3 artifacts to avoid conflict with
  the new CJS polyfill injection
- Fix import paths in qualisero-background-notify and qualisero-safe-git
  from ../../shared to ./shared with new per-extension shared.ts files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
